key.name: enable-boot-boost
key.description: Whether to apply startup and delayed power profiles automatically.

key.name: startup-profile
key.description: The power profile applied when the extension is enabled.

key.name: enable-delayed-profile
key.description: Whether to apply another power profile after the configured delay.

key.name: delayed-profile
key.description: The power profile applied after the configured delay.

key.name: delay-seconds
key.description: The number of seconds before switching to the delayed power profile.

key.name: enable-process-rules
key.description: Whether selected running processes should apply their configured power modes.

key.name: process-scan-interval
key.description: Seconds between full scans for matching running processes.

key.name: show-indicator
key.description: Whether to show the panel indicator for the current profile.

key.name: colorize-indicator
key.description: Whether to colorize the panel indicator according to the current profile.

key.name: show-profile-label
key.description: Whether to show the current profile name next to the panel indicator.

key.name: sync-active-profile
key.description: Whether to periodically read the active system profile so the indicator stays in sync with external changes. This may cause stuttering on some systems.

key.name: sync-active-profile-pause-on-fullscreen
key.description: Whether to skip active profile synchronization while fullscreen or borderless windows are active.

key.name: indicator-order
key.description: The order of the profile indicator within its panel section.

key.name: show-cpu-metrics
key.description: Whether to show CPU temperature and frequency in the panel.

key.name: metrics-mode
key.description: Which CPU info should be shown in the panel.

key.name: metrics-position
key.description: Which panel box should contain the CPU info indicator.

key.name: metrics-margin
key.description: The horizontal margin around the CPU info indicator in pixels.

key.name: metrics-order
key.description: The order of the CPU info indicator within its panel section.
